channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Sweetgreen: Alice Waters Peach & Goat Cheese Salad
item.guid: Sweetgreen-Alice Waters Peach & Goat Cheese Sal-2026-07-21
item.description: Limited-edition summer collab salad available at all Sweetgreen locations nationwide, with 1% of net sales donated to The Edible Schoolyard Project. (Through August 10, 2026)

item.title: Tropical Smoothie Cafe: Free 24oz Smoothie with $20+ Order — Sweet Treat Week
item.guid: Tropical Smoothie Cafe-Free 24oz Smoothie with $20+ Order — Swe-2026-07-21
item.description: Order $20 or more this week and get a free 24oz smoothie; part of a national Sweet Treat Week promotion running July 16–22. (Through July 22, 2026)

item.title: Jamba: Hat Trick Tango Smoothie — 50% Off
item.description: Celebrate FIFA World Cup 2026 with Jamba's limited-time Hat Trick Tango smoothie at 50% off at participating locations. (Limited time)

item.title: Wingstop: $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal — Soccer Season
item.guid: Wingstop-$16.99 Boneless Meal Deal — Soccer Seaso-2026-07-21
item.description: Score 20 boneless wings, a large fry, and two dips for $16.99 — Wingstop's revived fan-favorite bundle back for FIFA World Cup season. (Limited time)

item.title: McDonald's: $5 Value Meal Box
item.description: Daily in-app deal — McDouble or McChicken, small fries, 4-piece McNuggets, and a small drink for $5 at participating locations nationwide. (Ongoing)

item.title: Burger King: $5 Your Way Meal + Free Fries
item.guid: Burger King-$5 Your Way Meal + Free Fries-2026-07-21
item.description: Build your own $5 combo with a Whopper Jr., Bacon Cheeseburger, or Chicken Jr. plus fries, nuggets, and a drink — available all summer. (Limited time)

item.title: Popeyes: $5 Faves Menu
item.description: Choose three pieces of chicken, two sides, or a sandwich from Popeyes' value-focused Faves Menu — no code needed, available in-store and in-app. (Through August 31, 2026)

item.title: Domino's: Any Pizza for $9.99 — Best Deal Ever
item.guid: Domino's-Any Pizza for $9.99 — Best Deal Ever-2026-07-21
item.description: Order any pizza at any size for $9.99, now including Parmesan Stuffed Crust at no extra charge, via the Domino's app or online. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: KFC: 5 Tenders for $5 — Digital Deal
item.description: Grab five crispy chicken tenders for just $5 when you order through the KFC app on a weekday. (Ongoing)

item.title: Sonic: $7 Big Deal Meal
item.description: Sonic Cheeseburger, small Premium Chicken Bites, medium fries or tots, and a medium drink — all for $7 at participating drive-ins. (Limited time)

item.title: Sonic: $1.99 Permanent Value Menu
item.description: Permanent everyday menu featuring a Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger, Cheesy Baja Crispy Tender Wrap, Vanilla Soft Serve Cup, and Small Root Beer Float — all at $1.99. (Ongoing)

item.title: Jack in the Box: Hot Ones Menu — Limited Time
item.guid: Jack in the Box-Hot Ones Menu — Limited Time-2026-07-21
item.description: Jack in the Box is serving a special Hot Ones-branded spicy menu for a limited time — available late night at 24-hour locations. (Limited time)

item.title: IHOP: $6 Value Menu
item.description: IHOP's ongoing $6 Value Menu offers budget-friendly breakfast and dinner plates around the clock — great for late-night diners. (Ongoing)

item.title: Denny's: 'The Clock's Off' All-Day Menu
item.description: Denny's new around-the-clock menu spans breakfast, lunch, and dinner available at any hour — perfect for late-night runs at participating locations nationwide. (Ongoing)

item.title: Del Taco: $1 Bean & Cheese Burrito — Value Menu
item.guid: Del Taco-$1 Bean & Cheese Burrito — Value Men-2026-07-21
item.description: Del Taco's new value menu includes a $1 Bean & Cheese Burrito as one of its lowest-priced items, available all day at participating locations. (Ongoing)
